title: The Broken Washing Machine
content: While washing clothes one evening, Noah suddenly heard a strange noise coming from the washing machine. Water started leaking onto the kitchen floor, and the machine stopped completely. Noah quickly grabbed towels and tried to clean the mess before it spread further. Feeling stressed, he called a repair service and explained the problem. The technician promised to visit the next morning. That night, Noah realized how difficult simple daily tasks become when something important at home stops working unexpectedly.
